title: The 7 Best Utility Stocks to Buy as Yields Rise
text: With monetary policy possibly about to take a turn for the worst for risk-on assets, investors should consider the best utility stocks to buy. Unfortunately for Wall Street, the Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) index came in hotter than economists anticipated.

title: Exelon Teams Win EPRI 2022 Technology Transfer Awards for Innovation
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Five teams led by Exelon (Nasdaq: EXC) engineers and innovators received Electric Power Research Institute's (EPRI) 2022 Technology Transfer Awards.

title: Exelon Named to Fortune's Most Admired Companies List
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Exelon (Nasdaq: EXC), the nation's largest energy delivery company, has been named to Fortune magazine's list of the World's Most Admired Companies for the 15th consecutive year. Fortune ranks companies on criteria from investment value and quality of management and products to social responsibility and the ability to attract talent.

title: The 10 Biggest Utilities With Over 50% Gross Margin
text: Profits for utility companies vary widely depending on region to region. Despite this, the utility sector enjoys relatively high profit margins, primarily due to barriers to entry and other legislative restrictions on competition.

title: Young Women in Illinois Can Apply to Build, Race Electric-Powered Racecars in ComEd EV Rally
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--With Women's History Month just around the corner, ComEd is excited to announce the return of its signature science, technology, engineering and math (STEM) program for future women's history-makers, the ComEd EV Rally. Young women in Illinois can now apply to participate in the annual summer event, a competition that challenges teen girls to build and race high-tech, electric-powered go-carts.

title: Exelon Energy Delivery Companies ACE, BGE, ComEd, Delmarva Power, PECO and Pepco Helped Connect More Than One Million Customers to Over $1 Billion in Energy Assistance in 2021 and 2022
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Exelon (Nasdaq: EXC) and its energy delivery companies—Atlantic City Electric (ACE), Baltimore Gas and Electric (BGE), ComEd, Delmarva Power, PECO and Pepco—joined other advocates in Washington, D.C., yesterday to support LIHEAP Action Day.

title: Exelon announces upcoming changes to its Board of Directors
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Exelon (NASDAQ: EXC) today announced its Board will nominate two new Board candidates, Charisse R. Lillie and Matthew C. Rogers, to shareholders at the upcoming April 25, 2023, Annual Shareholders Meeting. Directors Paul Joskow, Ann Berzin and Carlos Gutierrez will be leaving the Board at the end of their terms and will not stand for re-election.

title: Exelon (EXC) Q4 Earnings on Par With Estimates, Revenues Beat
text: Exelon's (EXC) fourth-quarter earnings per share are on par with estimates. EXC plans long-term capital expenditures to further strengthen operations and meet customer requirements.

title: Exelon Corporation (EXC) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Exelon Corporation (NASDAQ:EXC ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 14, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Andy Plenge – Vice President-Investor Relations Calvin Butler – President and Chief Executive Officer Jeanne Jones – Chief Financial Officer Gil Quiniones – Chief Executive Officer-ComEd Mike Innocenzo – President and Chief Executive Officer-PECO Conference Call Participants Nick Campanella – Credit Suisse Steven Fleishman – Wolfe Research David Arcaro – Morgan Stanley James Kennedy – Guggenheim Partners Durgesh Chopra – Evercore ISI Operator Hello and welcome to Exelon's Fourth Quarter Earnings Call. My name is Gigi and I'll be your event specialist today.

title: Exelon (EXC) Q4 Earnings Match Estimates
text: Exelon (EXC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 3.25%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Exelon Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Results and Initiates 2023 Financial Outlook
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $EXC--Exelon Corporation (Nasdaq: EXC) today reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2022.

title: Exelon (EXC) to Report Q4 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
text: Exelon Corporation (EXC) fourth-quarter earnings are likely to have benefited from implementation of new rates and recent developments in its service territories.

title: Summit Ridge Energy and ComEd Mark 75th Community Solar Project in Northern Illinois
text: JOLIET, Ill.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--ComEd and Summit Ridge Energy (SRE) today announced the opening of the 75th community solar development in ComEd's service territory. The 2.495 megawatt (MW) Speedway Solar project 10 miles south of Joliet, Ill., will provide more than 350 ComEd customers with access to the benefits of solar energy and savings on their energy bills.

title: ComEd, City of Chicago Announce Historic Energy and Equity Agreement, New Franchise Agreement
text: CHICAGO--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Building on a strong, 100-year history, the City of Chicago and ComEd today announced that a deal has been reached on a pair of agreements for the future - an Energy and Equity Agreement and a new franchise agreement. These agreements, working together, will help Chicago support equitable access to cleaner energy; expand workforce development initiatives, including in under resourced communities; expand clean transportation options; and provide tools that empower Chicago families and businesses to reduce energy use and save money, while enabling ComEd to continue to provide industry-leading service to its customers in Chicago. The agreements also dovetail with ComEd's proposed multi-year plans designed to support broader economic, equity and environmental goals. Both agreements will extend for a term of 15 years plus the option of a five-year extension and are subject to approval by the Chicago City Council and Boards of ComEd and Exelon.
